untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a portfolio construction methodology (BAB factor strategy with volatility rescaling) rather than a price-based trading signal. It requires: (1) construction of multiple BAB (Betting Against Beta) sub-strategies across asset classes, (2) dynamic volatility rescaling to 10% target using rolling 3-year volatility estimates, and (3) equal-weighting across asset classes. These are portfolio-level operations not expressible as price/indicator conditions. The allowed indicators cannot capture cross-asset volatility calculations, multi-strategy composition logic, or dynamic risk parity weighting mechanics.
translation_notes: Signal is a factor/portfolio allocation rule, not a directional trading signal. Would require custom backtest engine with multi-asset support, volatility forecasting module, and strategy composition layer. Recommend implementing as separate portfolio construction function outside standard indicator-based rule engine.
